overview.Name: Brightspire Capital Inc
overview.Description: Brightspire Capital Inc. (BRSP) is a leading real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on acquiring and managing a diversified portfolio of income-generating commercial properties across the United States. Leveraging a disciplined investment strategy, the company identifies high-quality assets in prime locations, targeting sustainable returns while prioritizing risk management and capital preservation. With a commitment to effective asset management, Brightspire is well-positioned to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the commercial real estate sector, aiming to create long-term value for its investors.
overview.Address: 590 MADISON AVENUE, NEW YORK, NY, UNITED STATES, 10022
